content:
It's 4am. JJ crawled into my bed again. I can't sleep when the dude is in there. So I got up, had a coffee, did the washing and folding, did the dishes, cleaned the oven. All in under 30min. Now I'm about to sit and do some meditation or watch some woo woo videos on YouTube. Maybe I'll go out and work on my mind movie too. It started off as stress cleaning but I'm actually really feeling good. Will probably take some pills and go back to bed when he wakes up.

Creation is one emanation, divided only in appearance.

Love isn't romantic, it's alignment.
